title: helenium autumnale var. pumilum
intro: Helenium autumnale var. pumilum, also known as dwarf sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Helenium autumnale var. pumilum can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
